title: Proclamation by the President of the United States: National Angel Family Day, 2026
summary: This presidential proclamation designates National Angel Family Day for 2026. It recognizes victims of violent crime and drug trafficking associated with individuals unlawfully present in the United States and across the border, expresses solidarity with families affected by these incidents, and notes the ongoing impact on communities.

title: Nominations Sent to the Senate for United States Attorney for the District of Nevada and for Assistant Secretaries of State and the Interior
summary: The White House announced nominations to the Senate for three positions: George Kelesis of Nevada to be United States Attorney for the District of Nevada for a four-year term, succeeding Jason M. Frierson; Catherine Dillon of Maryland to be an Assistant Secretary of State (Educational and Cultural Affairs), succeeding Lee Satterfield, who resigned; and William Hague of Washington to be an Assistant Secretary of the Interior.

title: Proposal to Strengthen U.S. National Defense by Expanding Clean Coal Power Generation Fleet
summary: This presidential action outlines a plan to ensure the United States' electric grid remains resilient and reliable for military installations, operations, and defense-related industrial production. It argues that the grid is foundational to national defense and economic stability and discusses reducing reliance on intermittent energy sources to prevent prolonged disruptions due to energy supply issues.
